# UC-13.1.53 · Prometheus TSDB WAL Corruption or Repair Log Events

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Fault, Resilience &middot; **Status:** Draft

*We watch the metric stack and its limits so we notice scrape, storage, and query pressure before charts lie or go empty.*

---

## Description

WAL issues risk data loss and long restarts after crashes.

## Value

Flags TSDB integrity problems requiring immediate storage investigation.

## Implementation

Enable debug logging only briefly; ship to isolated index with retention controls.

## SPL

```spl
index=prometheus (sourcetype="prometheus:log" OR sourcetype="prometheus:tsdb")
| search "WAL" AND ("corrupt" OR "repair" OR "truncat")
| stats count, latest(_time) as last_seen by host, message
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Timeline, Table (host × message).

## Known False Positives

Noisy periods after retention, target, or scrape changes. We compare with the Grafana or Prometheus view for the same minutes.

## References

- [Prometheus documentation — monitoring Prometheus](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/troubleshooting/)
- [Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector](https://docs.splunk.com/observability/en/gdi/opentelemetry/opentelemetry.html)
